theme.style: Warm Australian vineyard world rendered in deep olive greens, burnished earth browns, and golden amber light. The mood is grounded and premium — rich organic depth inspired by sun-baked soil and vine rows at golden hour. Backgrounds use layered volumetric warmth and subtle texture to feel rooted in the land without being literal, giving the app a confident, professional agricultural identity.

slides.label: Spray Program
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract 3D rendered scene of sweeping liquid silk ribbons curling from the lower-left to upper-right in deep forest olive, warm burnished amber, and rich mahogany brown, their surfaces catching soft cinematic light from the lower-right. Mid-ground layers of translucent frosted glass sheets add depth and subtle refraction, with fine particulate dust suspended in the warm volumetric glow. The upper 30% fades to a calm, near-black deep olive with smooth atmospheric haze for text readability. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups.

slides.label: Vineyard Setup
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital art featuring a constellation of large diffused amber and aged-bronze light spheres drifting across a vast deep charcoal-olive expanse, each emitting soft radial halos that bleed into one another with cinematic warmth from the left edge. Scattered translucent geometric shards catch thin lines of golden side-light, creating layered depth against the dark organic background. The upper 30% is open, dark, and calm — a smooth gradient into near-black deep green. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups.
